query:
SELECT s.skill_id, s.name, s.rarity, s.npc_id, n.name as npc_name, s.learn_cost 
FROM game_unified_skill_catalog s 
LEFT JOIN game_npc_catalog n ON s.npc_id = n.id 
WHERE s.npc_id IS NOT NULL 
LIMIT 20

WHERE s.npc_id IS NOT NULL 
LIMIT 20
